desc: The AI automation platform, self-hosted. Describe the job in chat and LiveContext builds it: readable workflows, scoped AI agents, and small apps your team use…
descFull: The AI automation platform, self-hosted. Describe the job in chat and LiveContext builds it: readable workflows, scoped AI agents, and small apps your team uses. Chat, Workflow, Agent and App on one canvas.
